memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection of Brain DB.
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent.
It is unresolved whether Telegram should be added later.
It is unresolved which model is cheapest while saturating performance.

details: Parsed the markdown chat summary as durable architecture memory and open questions.
Committed three architecture principles and two unresolved questions while preserving ambiguity.
